/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/minimeshgui.dir/main.cpp.o -o ../../../bin/minimeshgui  -Wl,-rpath,/home/sghys/projects/CPSC524-modeling/third-party/glui/bin-opensuse-gcc731/debug/lib ../core/libminimeshcore.a ../viz/libminimeshviz.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglut.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /home/sghys/projects/CPSC524-modeling/third-party/glui/bin-opensuse-gcc731/debug/lib/libgluid.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
